name: meigen-visual-creative-expert
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "generate an image", "create artwork", "design a logo", "make a poster", "draw something", "find inspiration", "search for reference images", "enhance my prompt", "improve prompt", "brand design", "product mockup", "batch generate images", "multiple variations", or discusses AI image generation, visual creativity, prompt engineering, reference images, style transfer, or any image creation task. Also activate when user mentions MeiGen, image mode...
